Container.Name: subnautica-nitrox
Container.Overview:
Subnautica Multiplayer Server using the Nitrox mod.
Nitrox is a native Linux server — Proton is NOT used for this game.
**Data layout (all under /data):** - /data/server/Subnautica/ — Subnautica game files - /data/server/Nitrox/ — Nitrox server files - /data/saves/ — world saves (per save name) - /data/logs/ — server.log - /data/backups/ — automated daily backups
**Requirements:** You must own Subnautica on the Steam account used for download. Set STEAM_USER and STEAM_PASSWORD (or use STEAM_GUARD_CODE for 2FA accounts).
**Port:** 11000/udp

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Stores server files (/server), saves (/saves), logs (/logs), and backups (/backups).

Config.Name: Server Password
Config.Description: Server join password. Leave empty for a public server.

Config.Name: Save Name
Config.Description: Name of the save slot to load/create.

Config.Name: Steam Username
Config.Description: Steam account username. Required to download Subnautica.

Config.Name: Steam Guard Code
Config.Description: Steam Guard 2FA code if your account has it enabled.

Config.Name: Game Port
Config.Description: Nitrox server port (must match port mapping below).

Config.Name: Validate Files
Config.Description: Re-validate game files on each start (true/false).

Config.Name: Game Config
Config.Description: Game preset selector. Do not change.

Config.Name: Steam App ID
Config.Description: Subnautica App ID. Do not change.
